step_rationale: Glucose transporter upregulation during I/R injury; myocardial metabolic adaptation.
mechanism: GLUT1 upregulation facilitates myocardial glucose uptake during ischemia-reperfusion injury.

references.title: Cardiac ischaemia/reperfusion in pigs and mice increases cardiomyocyte Krüppel-like factor 5 that aggravates tissue injury and remodelling.
